novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Instead of joining Liu Bei, was historically part of a group with He Yi, He Man and Huang Shao, who Yuan Shu, then Sun Jian. Later, they were all defeated and Liu Pi was executed by Cao Cao.

full_text:
Liu Pi 劉辟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Pi (劉辟). After rebelling with the Yellow Scarves, moved to Runan. Later joined Liu Bei. Liu Pi was affiliated with Yellow Scarves, Yuan Shao, the Shu Kingdom, and Yuan Shu. Liu Pi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
